User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing authentication indicators, api keys for exchanges, and simulated balances.

recoveryPhrase.description: Recovery phrase used to reset password

apiKeys.description: Map of exchange API credentials stored securely by the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

Bot.title: Trading Bot
Bot.description: Configuration for Signal-based or DCA-based trading bots.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this trading bot

name.description: Custom name given to the bot

baseOrderSize.description: Investment amount in USDT for the initiating base order

safetyOrderSize.description: DCA only: Investment amount in USDT for scaling safety orders

priceDeviation.description: DCA only: Percentage price drop to trigger a safety order

maxSafetyOrders.description: DCA only: Maximum number of active safety orders allowed

takeProfitPercent.description: Percentage profit target index to trigger sell/take-profit

trailingTpPercent.description: Trailing departure tolerance once take-profit is activated

trailingSlEnabled.description: Whether Stop Loss trails behind ascending price

webhookSecret.description: Token to authorize webhook signal executions

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the bot was created

Position.title: Trading Position
Position.description: Active or closed trade executions managed by signal/DCA bots.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this position

botId.description: The bot configuration controlling this position

currentPrice.description: Last tracked market price for evaluation

totalInvested.description: Cumulative portfolio size invested in USDT

safetyOrdersCount.description: DCA only: Number of times safety order scaled-in

maxPriceSeen.description: Peak market price seen since profit target was breached

trailingTpActive.description: True if target price was hit and bot is trailing profits upward

tpTriggerPrice.description: Initial target price where profit tracking is enabled

pnl.description: Profit or loss accrued in USDT

Log.title: System Log
Log.description: Status triggers, order fills, webhook alerts, or errors logged by bots.

type.description: Severity / category marker for log grouping

users/{userId}.description: Primary user configuration profiles containing balance indicators, recovery codes, and exchange connection credentials.

bots/{botId}.description: Registered trading bots configured for custom price intervals or exterior webhook triggers.

positions/{positionId}.description: Historical and open asset holdings associated with running bot systems.
